content.text:
He's... competent. Demanding. Not cruel, I want to be clear about that — he's not a bad person. But there's this thing he does where he goes quiet when he's disappointed, and the whole room kind of holds its breath. And I just... I stop being able to think. I can't access anything. Whatever I knew thirty seconds ago is just gone.

It's embarrassing, honestly. I'm good at my job. I know I'm good at my job. And then he looks at me a certain way and I'm just — nothing.
